channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 27th March
item.description:
Dumped rubbish next to bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Galliard Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and flytipping of green waste, 27th March
item.description:
Flytipping of green waste and litter across footpath. In alley that runs between Iron Mill Place and the footpath between Green Walk and Rectory Close.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Walk, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of broken glass on pavements on both sides, 27th March
item.description:
Broken glass from car window and broken bottles on one side More broken glass from bottle on other side. Dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 27th March
item.description:
This has been reported before in the last 18 months but no action has been taken by the council.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linton Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left in walkway between 8 & 10 Lovel Avenue, 27th March
item.description:
Bags of clothes being taken from clothes bank and brought to alleyway where they are ripped open and left around. Also rear garden access behind No. 8 Lovel Avenue which is managed by L&Q full of dumped rubbish, bottles etc. This is an ongoing problem with L&Q and it has not been cleared over 12 months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linton Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Empty suitcase abandoned, 27th March
item.description:
An empty suitcase has been left on the Street on Crossmead just as you get towards Court Road onnthe left side (with Fairy Hill Park behind you). Please can it be removed? Thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crossmead, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Racist Graffiti AGAIN, 27th March
item.description:
This is the THIRD TIME I have reported this sign. Each time it is cleared and then the offender does it again. Either please REMOVE THE SIGN COMPLETELY OR PAINT IT A DARK COLOUR or it will happen again!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 27th March
item.description:
Yet again more rubbish has been dumped outside our gate.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Watermint Quay, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Armchair dumped, 27th March
item.description:
Armchair and blue ikea bag dumped in usual space at entrance to Broad Oak Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Mickleham Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering from the driver of this car, 27th March
item.description:
The driver carelessly threw a plastic cup out of the window without any shame. It looked like it was an iced coffee or milkshake.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Cambridge Road, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leave and branch debris, 27th March
item.description:
This has been here for 6 months and is partially blocking the pavement. Street is not being swept

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Highcombe, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Accummulation of rubbish, 27th March
item.description:
I reported this two weeks ago and it is still there.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Spray Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road was relaid and they burst the sewer pipe so road is leaking, 27th March
item.description:
Whole road was relaid and this part of the road is weeping with dirty water, it appears that whilst repairing the road they may hit a Gas or Hazardous Lines as the leak is in line with a spray painted S on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Great Elms Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The usual problem, 27th March
item.description:
Litter everywhere - no bins at all now. How disgusting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 27th March
item.description:
Left on street for several days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roding Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle on Shawbrooke Road, 27th March
item.description:
Abandoned car, possibly stolen. Broken window and possibly flat tyre

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edgeworth Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 27th March
item.description:
Rubbish bags
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, Welling, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 garden waste bins have been dumped outside the garage to the rear of 90 Albert Road in Parkhurst Road, 27th March
item.description:
2 garden waste bins have been dumped outside the garage to the rear of 90 Albert Road in Parkhurst Road - they have been there for around 2 months now and no one around the area has claimed them...it is blocking resident's garage door - please can these be removed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2A, Parkhurst Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fences area broken, 27th March
item.description:
There must have been a fence of sorts here which is now missing. Its left these posts in the ground which could be dangerous if someone fell or tripped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ballantyne Close, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping And Rubbish Accumulated By Bins, 27th March
item.description:
The bins within this car park are prone to fly tipping, there’s currently masses of boxes, chairs and junk in a pile and the state of the bins and the area around them is appalling - I have to look out of my window at this and it needs better policing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
